children.heading: Reduction in refund in certain cases
children.label: 2 Reduction in refund in certain cases

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraphs (B) and (C), the rate of tax taken into account under paragraph (1) shall be 7.4 cents per gallon less than the aggregate rate at which tax was imposed on such fuel by section 4041(a) or 4081, as the case may be.

children.heading: Exception for school bus transportation
children.label: B Exception for school bus transportation
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to fuel used in an automobile bus while engaged in the transportation described in paragraph (1)(B).

i

children.text: which has a seating capacity of at least 20 adults (not including the driver), and

children.label: ii
children.text: which is under contract (or is receiving more than a nominal subsidy) from any State or local government (as defined in section 4221(d)) to furnish such transportation.

children.heading: Limitation in case of nonscheduled intercity or local buses
children.label: 3 Limitation in case of nonscheduled intercity or local buses
children.text: Paragraph (1)(A) shall not apply in respect of fuel used in any automobile bus while engaged in furnishing transportation which is not scheduled and not along regular routes unless the seating capacity of such bus is at least 20 adults (not including the driver).

children.label: 4 Refunds for use of diesel fuel in certain intercity buses
A

children.heading: Use for farming purposes
children.label: c Use for farming purposes
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (k), if any fuel on the sale of which tax was imposed under paragraph (2) or (3) of section 4041(a) or section 4041(c) is used on a farm for farming purposes (within the meaning of section 6420(c)), the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to the purchaser an amount equal to the amount of the tax imposed on the sale of the fuel. For purposes of this subsection, if fuel is used on a farm by any person other than the owner, tenant, or operator of such farm, the rules of paragraph (4) of section 6420(c) shall be applied (except that “liquid taxable under section 4041” shall be substituted for “gasoline” each place it appears in such paragraph (4)).

children.label: d Use by certain aircraft museums or in certain other aircraft uses

children.heading: Alcohol, biodiesel, alternative fuel, or sustainable aviation fuel
children.label: e Alcohol, biodiesel, alternative fuel, or sustainable aviation fuel

children.heading: Used to produce a mixture
children.label: 1 Used to produce a mixture
children.text: If any person produces a mixture described in section 6426 in such person’s trade or business, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to such person an amount equal to the alcohol fuel mixture credit or the biodiesel mixture credit or the alternative fuel mixture credit or the sustainable aviation fuel mixture credit with respect to such mixture.

children.heading: Alternative fuel
children.label: 2 Alternative fuel
children.text: If any person sells or uses an alternative fuel (as defined in section 6426(d)(2)) for a purpose described in section 6426(d)(1) in such person’s trade or business, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to such person an amount equal to the alternative fuel credit with respect to such fuel.

children.heading: Coordination with other repayment provisions
children.label: 3 Coordination with other repayment provisions
children.text: No amount shall be payable under paragraph (1) or (2) with respect to any mixture or alternative fuel with respect to which an amount is allowed as a credit under section 6426.

children.heading: Registration requirement for alternative fuels
children.label: 4 Registration requirement for alternative fuels
children.text: The Secretary shall not make any payment under this subsection to any person with respect to any alternative fuel credit or alternative fuel mixture credit unless the person is registered under section 4101.

children.heading: Limitation to fuels with connection to the United States
children.label: 5 Limitation to fuels with connection to the United States
children.text: No amount shall be payable under paragraph (1) or (2) with respect to any mixture or alternative fuel if credit is not allowed with respect to such mixture or alternative fuel by reason of section 6426(i).

children.heading: Blend stocks not used for producing taxable fuel
children.label: h Blend stocks not used for producing taxable fuel

children.heading: Gasoline blend stocks or additives not used for producing gasoline
children.label: 1 Gasoline blend stocks or additives not used for producing gasoline
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (k), if any gasoline blend stock or additive (within the meaning of section 4083(a)(2)) is not used by any person to produce gasoline and such person establishes that the ultimate use of such gasoline blend stock or additive is not to produce gasoline, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to such person an amount equal to the aggregate amount of the tax imposed on such person with respect to such gasoline blend stock or additive.

children.heading: Diesel fuel blend stocks or additives not used for producing diesel
children.label: 2 Diesel fuel blend stocks or additives not used for producing diesel
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (k), if any diesel fuel blend stock is not used by any person to produce diesel fuel and such person establishes that the ultimate use of such diesel fuel blend stock is not to produce diesel fuel, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to such person an amount equal to the aggregate amount of the tax imposed on such person with respect to such diesel fuel blend stock.

children.heading: Time for filing claims; period covered
children.label: i Time for filing claims; period covered

children.heading: General rule
children.label: 1 General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subsection, not more than one claim may be filed under subsection (a), (b), (c), (d), (h), (), (m), or () by any person with respect to fuel used during his taxable year; and no claim shall be allowed under this paragraph with respect to fuel used during any taxable year unless filed by the purchaser not later than the time prescribed by law for filing a claim for credit or refund of overpayment of income tax for such taxable year. For purposes of this paragraph, a person’s taxable year shall be his taxable year for purposes of subtitle A.lo

children.label: i
children.text: such quarter, or

children.label: ii
children.text: any prior quarter (for which no other claim has been filed) during such taxable year,

children.heading: Time for filing claim
children.label: B Time for filing claim
children.text: No claim filed under this paragraph shall be allowed unless filed during the first quarter following the last quarter included in the claim.

children.heading: Nonapplication of paragraph
children.label: C Nonapplication of paragraph
children.text: This paragraph shall not apply to any fuel used solely in any off-highway business use described in section 6421(e)(2)(C).

children.heading: Special rule for mixture credits and the alternative fuel credit
children.label: 3 Special rule for mixture credits and the alternative fuel credit
i

children.heading: Payment of claim
children.label: B Payment of claim
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (e)(1) or (e)(2), if the Secretary has not paid pursuant to a claim filed under this section within 45 days of the date of the filing of such claim (20 days in the case of an electronic claim), the claim shall be paid with interest from such date determined by using the overpayment rate and method under section 6621.

children.heading: Time for filing claim
children.label: C Time for filing claim
children.text: No claim filed under this paragraph shall be allowed unless filed on or before the last day of the first quarter following the earliest quarter included in the claim.

children.heading: Time for filing claim
children.label: B Time for filing claim
children.text: No claim filed under this paragraph shall be allowed unless filed on or before the last day of the first quarter following the earliest quarter included in the claim.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: All provisions of law, including penalties, applicable in respect of the taxes imposed by sections 4041 and 4081 shall, insofar as applicable and not inconsistent with this section, apply in respect of the payments provided for in this section to the same extent as if such payments constituted refunds of overpayments of the tax so imposed.

children.heading: Examination of books and witnesses
children.label: 2 Examination of books and witnesses
children.text: For the purpose of ascertaining the correctness of any claim made under this section, or the correctness of any payment made in respect of any such claim, the Secretary shall have the authority granted by paragraphs (1), (2), and (3) of section 7602(a) (relating to examination of books and witnesses) as if the claimant were the person liable for tax.

children.heading: Income tax credit in lieu of payment
children.label: k Income tax credit in lieu of payment

children.heading: Persons not subject to income tax
children.label: 1 Persons not subject to income tax
A
children.text: the United States or an agency or instrumentality thereof, a State, a political subdivision of a State, or any agency or instrumentality of one or more States or political subdivisions, or

children.label: B
children.text: an organization exempt from tax under section 501(a) (other than an organization required to make a return of the tax imposed under subtitle A for its taxable year).

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to a payment of a claim filed under paragraph (2), (3), or (4) of subsection (i).

children.heading: Allowance of credit against income tax
children.label: 3 Allowance of credit against income tax
children.text: For allowances of credit against the income tax imposed by subtitle A for fuel used or resold by the purchaser, see section 34.

children.heading: Nontaxable uses of diesel fuel and kerosene
children.label: l Nontaxable uses of diesel fuel and kerosene

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subsection and in subsection (k), if any diesel fuel or kerosene on which tax has been imposed by section 4041 or 4081 is used by any person in a nontaxable use, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to the ultimate purchaser of such fuel an amount equal to the aggregate amount of tax imposed on such fuel under section 4041 or 4081, as the case may be, reduced by any payment made to the ultimate vendor under paragraph (4)(C)(i).

children.heading: Nontaxable use
children.label: 2 Nontaxable use
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “nontaxable use” means any use which is exempt from the tax imposed by section 4041(a)(1) other than by reason of a prior imposition of tax.

children.heading: Refund of certain taxes on fuel used in diesel-powered trains
children.label: 3 Refund of certain taxes on fuel used in diesel-powered trains
A
children.text: the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate under sections 4041 and 4081, and

children.label: B
children.text: so much of the rate specified in section 4081(a)(2)(A) as does not exceed the rate applicable under section 4041(a)(1)(C)(ii).

children.label: 4 Refunds for kerosene used in aviation

children.label: A Kerosene used in commercial aviation
i
children.text: the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate imposed by such section, and

children.label: ii
children.text: so much of the rate of tax specified in section 4041(c) or 4081(a)(2)(A)(iii), as the case may be, as does not exceed 4.3 cents per gallon.

children.label: B Kerosene used in noncommercial aviation
i

children.label: I

children.label: II
children.text: so much of the rate of tax specified in section 4081(a)(2)(A)(iii) as does not exceed the rate specified in section 4081(a)(2)(C)(ii).

children.label: C Payments to ultimate, registered vendor
I
children.text: is registered under section 4101, and

children.label: II
children.text: meets the requirements of subparagraph (A), (B), or (D) of section 6416(a)(1).

children.heading: Payments for kerosene used in noncommercial aviation
children.label: ii Payments for kerosene used in noncommercial aviation
I
children.text: is registered under section 4101, and

children.label: II
children.text: meets the requirements of subparagraph (A), (B), or (D) of section 6416(a)(1).

children.heading: Registered vendors to administer claims for refund of diesel fuel or kerosene sold to State and local governments
children.label: 5 Registered vendors to administer claims for refund of diesel fuel or kerosene sold to State and local governments

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to diesel fuel or kerosene used by a State or local government.

children.heading: Sales of kerosene not for use in motor fuel
children.label: B Sales of kerosene not for use in motor fuel
i
children.text: for any use if such sale is from a pump which (as determined under regulations prescribed by the Secretary) is not suitable for use in fueling any diesel-powered highway vehicle or train, or

children.label: ii
children.text: to the extent provided by the Secretary, for blending with heating oil to be used during periods of extreme or unseasonable cold.

children.heading: Payment to ultimate, registered vendor
children.label: C Payment to ultimate, registered vendor
i
children.text: is registered under section 4101, and

children.label: ii
children.text: meets the requirements of subparagraph (A), (B), or (D) of section 6416(a)(1).

children.heading: Credit card issuer
children.label: D Credit card issuer
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, if the purchase of any fuel described in subparagraph (A) (determined without regard to the registration status of the ultimate vendor) is made by means of a credit card issued to the ultimate purchaser, the Secretary shall pay to the person extending the credit to the ultimate purchaser the amount which would have been paid under paragraph (1) (but for subparagraph (A)), but only if such person meets the requirements of clauses (i), (ii), and (iii) of section 6416(a)(4)(B). If such clause (i), (ii), or (iii) is not met by such person extending the credit to the ultimate purchaser, then such person shall collect an amount equal to the tax from the ultimate purchaser and only such ultimate purchaser may claim such amount.

children.heading: Diesel fuel used to produce emulsion
children.label: m Diesel fuel used to produce emulsion

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (k), if any diesel fuel on which tax was imposed by section 4081 at the regular tax rate is used by any person in producing an emulsion described in section 4081(a)(2)(D) which is sold or used in such person’s trade or business, the Secretary shall pay (without interest) to such person an amount equal to the excess of the regular tax rate over the incentive tax rate with respect to such fuel.

children.heading: Regular tax rate
children.label: A Regular tax rate
children.text: The term “regular tax rate” means the aggregate rate of tax imposed by section 4081 determined without regard to section 4081(a)(2)(D).

children.heading: Incentive tax rate
children.label: B Incentive tax rate
children.text: The term “incentive tax rate” means the aggregate rate of tax imposed by section 4081 determined with regard to section 4081(a)(2)(D).

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: n Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may by regulations prescribe the conditions, not inconsistent with the provisions of this section, under which payments may be made under this section.

children.heading: Payments for taxes imposed by section 4041(d)
children.label: o Payments for taxes imposed by section 4041(d)
children.text: For purposes of subsections (a), (b), and (c), the taxes imposed by section 4041(d) shall be treated as imposed by section 4041(a).
For civil penalty for excessive claims under this section, see section 6675.
For fraud penalties, etc., see chapter 75 (section 7201 and following, relating to crimes, other offenses, and forfeitures).
For treatment of an Indian tribal government as a State (and a subdivision of an Indian tribal government as a political subdivision of a State), see section 7871.
